home.meta.description.message: ReactPress 3.0: one npm package, one minute to your own CMS. Full-stack publishing on React, Next.js, and NestJS with zero-config init + dev.

home.hero.subTitle.message: One package, one minute to your own CMS — a full-stack publishing platform on React, Next.js, and NestJS.

home.cli.hint.message: After global install, run reactpress init — zero-config site in about a minute

在任意空目录粘贴运行，约 1 分钟完成零配置起站.message: Paste in any empty folder — zero-config site in about a minute

全局安装后执行 reactpress init，约 1 分钟零配置起站.message: After global install, run reactpress init — zero-config site in about a minute

home.highlight.zero.desc.message: init + dev auto-generates config and .env with Docker MySQL by default — no manual env files.

home.highlight.cli.desc.message: Install @fecommunity/reactpress@3 globally; init, dev, doctor, and status in one tool.

home.highlight.dx.desc.message: Interactive menus, doctor checks, status output, and direct links after dev succeeds.

home.quickstart.desc.message: Run these commands in an empty folder to start the blog and admin with zero manual setup.

home.call.subtitle.message: From personal blogs to team content sites — publishing and governance out of the box.

home.feature.zero.desc.message: reactpress init and dev generate config, .env, and embedded MySQL with a WordPress-style installer.

home.feature.cli.desc.message: doctor health checks, status output, interactive menus, and direct links after dev succeeds.

home.feature.ui.desc.message: Modern admin and front-end on Ant Design 5 with light/dark theme support.

home.feature.content.desc.message: Built-in Markdown editor; articles, categories, tags, pages, comments, and media (local / OSS).

home.feature.headless.desc.message: API keys, webhooks, health checks, and toolkit SDK for integrations and automation.

home.feature.i18n.desc.message: Chinese/English UI, SSR-friendly, responsive on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

init + dev 自动生成配置与 .env，默认 Docker MySQL，.message: init + dev auto-generates config and .env with Docker MySQL by default — no manual env files.

全局安装 @fecommunity/reactpress@3，init / de.message: Install @fecommunity/reactpress@3 globally; init, dev, doctor, and status in one tool.

交互式菜单、doctor 自检、status 状态与 dev 成功后的直达链接提.message: Interactive menus, doctor checks, status output, and direct links after dev succeeds.

在空目录执行以下命令，即可零配置启动博客与管理后台。.message: Run these commands in an empty folder to start the blog and admin with zero manual setup.

从个人博客到团队内容站，ReactPress 提供开箱即用的发布与治理能力。.message: From personal blogs to team content sites — publishing and governance out of the box.

装一个包，一分钟拥有自己的 CMS — 基于 React、Next.js 与 N.message: One package, one minute to your own CMS — a full-stack publishing platform on React, Next.js, and NestJS.

reactpress init 与 dev 自动生成配置、.env 与嵌入式 M.message: reactpress init and dev generate config, .env, and embedded MySQL with a WordPress-style installer.

doctor 环境自检、status 运行状态，交互式菜单与 dev 成功后的直.message: doctor health checks, status output, interactive menus, and direct links after dev succeeds.

基于 Ant Design 5 的现代化后台与前台，支持亮/暗主题切换。.message: Modern admin and front-end on Ant Design 5 with light/dark theme support.

内置 Markdown 编辑器，文章、分类、标签、页面、评论与媒体（本地上传 /.message: Built-in Markdown editor; articles, categories, tags, pages, comments, and media (local / OSS).

API Key、Webhook、健康检查与 toolkit SDK，便于对接外部.message: API keys, webhooks, health checks, and toolkit SDK for integrations and automation.

中英文界面切换，SSR 友好，适配桌面、平板与移动端。.message: Chinese/English UI, SSR-friendly, responsive on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

ReactPress 3.0：装一个包、一分钟拥有自己的 CMS。基于 Reac.message: ReactPress 3.0: one npm package, one minute to your own CMS. Full-stack publishing on React, Next.js, and NestJS with zero-config init + dev.
